Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not sure about the bathroom configuration   Very friendly staff great location loved the quirky interior lovely surprise of chocolate champagne in our Son s room for his 21st birthday

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It was all great   We were treated like royalty We arrived on my 73 birthday were upgraded to a suite and received excellent assistance in planning a side trip to the Canadian War Memorial in Groesbeek a key purpose for staying in Amsterdam after our river cruise

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Rooms are really small which is disappointing for the amount charged per night   Staff are simply fantastic Really helpful and very cheery Hotel was fantastically located and is a very interesting concept

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We booked a twin room and if I had any complaints I would say it was a bit on the small size but as we were only able to stay for one night it was adequate   All the hotel staff were extremely helpful friendly and whoever is doing the in house training is doing a great job we look forward to visiting again it is a very unique hotel In its previous life it was a printing press and the hotel decor reflects this

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 8 of us arrived early in the morning We were happy to wait around the corner in the lounge while people checked out but were not impressed when we found others lined up behind us had checked in before us On the plus side we were very grateful for the early check in and the extra we paid to not have to wait for one did give us a room we were very happy with Breakfast was a little costly we found a lovely cafe on a nearby corner that provided a tasty and healthy alternative Many cafes do not open for breakfast early one told us 11am   Really quirky hotel themed around its previous days as a printery Very handy location with lots of cafes and transport nearby Our room not at the front of the hotel was very quiet Loved it

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Would have preferred the all of the bathroom wash facilities to have been in another room although it was well presented Breakfast at 20 Euros day each was a little on the high side in my view  The hotel was in a good location with everything just a short walk away The trams stopped opposite the hotel which was very useful for discovery other parts of Amsterdam Bars and places to eat near the hotel Hotel was well presented with nice breakfast room and bar along with quite areas Good breakfast but a little pricey Staff were friendly and helpful Close to lively Dam Square and the fantastic canal areas Amsterdam is a great city and we will return

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Being charged for two breakfasts when we hadn t had them This was rectified and refunded   The decor of the whole hotel was very modern and tasteful The layout of the bedroom was nice The bar staff in the evening were very informative and helpful and very good at making a Gin and Tonic

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There was one night that I was given unclean towels but the hotel was very quick to change apologize and give me a couple drinks on the house   Staff and location make this place They go out of their way to make you comfortable and answer your questions concerns And location is wonderful definitely a bit touristy but perfect for a first visit to Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The hotel was unique new paper printer theme running through out from the wall paper to the restaurant to the employee s uniforms The employee s were super helpful and very pleasant to work with It was pretty much a flawless stay at a great place I marked them slightly off for price which was a bit high Given everything I would stay there again and recommend it to friends with no hesitation at all

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No complaints  Great spot just a ten minute walk from Centraal Station The staff was very friendly and helpful We arrived early after a long trip and they were kind enough to let us into our room early That turned the day around for us There is a tram stop about 100 meters from the front door and across the street an alley takes you to any number of shops and restaurants

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not enough wardrobe and drawer space Rain shower head Prefer normal shower   Great breakfast and dinner Staff wonderful any questions were answered with a smile Nothing was too much trouble for them Great position Clean and mordern

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Breakfast could have been continental OR full ie continental only The food itself was very good quality but not everyone can eat a full breakfast and 20 is expensive for a continental breakfast   Breakfast snack pre dinner drinks and dinner were all fantastic best food so far in the Netherlands as a tourist

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: be careful when choosing clasic room they are different  delicious breakfast very good location helpful service stylish room with the plan of the Amsterdam on the wall

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The sound of the mini bar fridge Otherwise the room was quiet   The room was designed with ingenuity very cleaver use of space Contemporary yet still having the character of a print factory Very comfy beds and great shower The staff are super friendly reception cleaners restaurant and bar staff Location could not be more convenient If you need to use public transport to get somewhere a bit quicker than walking there is a tram right outside

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Way too pricey but it might also be the period of the year July We basically paid the same amount for 3 nights in this 4 star hotel in Amsterdam and a 5 star hotel in Rotterdam just before Locations are different though The room lacked in storage space too Parking is very expensive in the area 50 day but the hotel offers a 20 discount per day still too much for parking your car no but that s Amsterdam   We liked the design of the hotel and the room Especially the map drawing on the room wall A book by the same artist is provided in the room The general design of the hotel an old newspaper printing house is great Staff was very useful and welcoming Very big fridge OK location close to Jordaan and Red Light District

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We didn t take the option of breakfast on offer as it appeared a little overpriced for our liking   The location of this hotel was excellent close to Amsterdam central station Great to walk to bars and restaurants nearby We were celebrating our wedding and we had a beautiful room It was the perfect mini break after our wedding

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The hotel felt a bit expensive but I think all of Amsterdam is expensive so it was probably in keeping with local prices   The INK Hotel is in a fantastic location near the Nine Streets and The Jordaan both picturesque areas within a network of canals The hotel is comfortable clean and friendly

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Upon arrival we were greeted by a very arrogant young man who looked down on us and the other guests He was in training Not sure why he was so arrogant We were nt in France We were very dressed in business attire and were friendly We were given a room that was tiny with a small bed with sloping roof My husband is tall and bumped his head The bed was tiny a double and I had booked a King We complained and were told that in The Netherlands a Queen is actually a double Lol what BS We were upgraded to an acceptable room for the money we paid It was very nicely designed I was working for a few days and even took a few publicity shots from the room as it was really cool   Great location for walking around Amsterdam Very cool interior design I often find that some MGallery hotels in the Accor group use the hipster interior design to charge more for inferior rooms e g small no bath and caravan like plastic showers This one was no exception but it was comfortable quiet and clean It had a small fridge to cool our champagne and store the cheese we purchased nearby The staff bought us a champagne bucket with ice and glasses in a good timeframe when we asked

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room quite small but not sure if this is standard for Amsterdam Soap shelf broken in shower and no shower door so water runs into the bathroom   Nice lounge and bar area etc Fantastic location Good coffee facilities in room

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff is extremely helpful Bar is fantastic Room is thoughtfully appointed and the bed is one of the most comfortable in Europe The design of the hotel is artful and a delight Love everything about this place

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Iron was supplied on request very quickly but it leaked all over the shirt   Breakfast was great room very clean and had what was needed expensive for the size of the room but in city centre probably par for the course

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Location location Room size was pretty good Good shower Nice lounge Reception staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful Local restaurants Transport at the door

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Excellent location Walking distance to the Central Station river cruise ship dockings Dam Square shopping and many of Amsterdam s other attractions We did a lot of walking at different times of the day and the immediate area felt safe always lots of people out and about While the room was small by North American standards it was very comfortable with a queen size bed had a small coffee pot and kettle it was clean had lots of hot water and interesting decor I would definitely recommend and stay there again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The mirror in the wash basin area was too far away an additional articulated magnifing mirror would be a good idea storage was rather poor The question re walking around the neighbourhood was marked low we arrived to the hotel using this route and it was very off putting when exiting the hotel to the right past a few resturants was a allyway that was badly kept The stench of human urin was very high and also human faeces not a good route at all understandably this is not part of the Ink hotel however I would suggest is used by many of your guests steer clear walk a little further along the main street and take the next right   Complimentary coffee and water were replaced when the maid came not just for the arrival The beds were fantastically comforatble Cleaning of the room was thorough however it did take a long time

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room being small and no privacy in the bathroom with no door to block the bedroom once you got out of the shower Especially not good when your travelling with a friend   We end up paying another 15 a night for a luxury room but it was so small They were trying to tell us the room we paid for was small that we should pay the extra for a bigger room I would have hated to see the other room we had booked

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There was no view from the room at all Just straight into the property next door However as the hotel is slap bang in the middle of Amsterdam its understandable Breakfast was very expensive for what it was and very little choice for a vegetarian so we ended up eating breakfast just down the road to save some money Having said that it really wasn t a problem and completely down to our choice   The hotel was centrally located very easy to get to all the places we wanted to go The hotel was lovely very modern and funky We had a lovely room the staff had even decorated it with balloons and left some fizz as it was my son s birthday Everyone was really friendly and helpful We were very well looked after

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Rooms are tiny but to be expected   Friendly staff good food and wine in restaurant location is close to everything Would stay again if we return to the city

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The hotel was clean and modern The room was very nice and comfortable I had a problem with the shower I didn t know there was a cover over the drain I had a lot of water in the shower and on the floor My husband figured it out We ate breakfast there and it was good

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Our stay at the INK Hotel was delightful The location is very central an easy walk to the train station and there is a GBV tram stop right outside the front door The staff was quite helpful and pleasant When we checked in they were having system problems but they worked quickly to resolve them We were in Room 501 for our thirteen night stay which was marvelous It has a high pitched ceiling with exposed beams It was almost like staying in a beautifully renovated Dutch apartment It was extremely quiet and the bed was very comfortable The WiFi throughout the hotel is quite fast One of the employees Sri was especially welcoming and friendly He gave us some great recommendations for restaurants and we always enjoyed interacting with him when entering or leaving the hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Toilet space design small room upgrade a rude nasty desk clerk on the morning we left A large man with a very bad attitude He left a bad taste in our mouth We waited outside for our taxi because he was still berating us   Location clean mostly helpful desk clerks Cool decor

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room 229 can be a little noisy if tables in central well are occupied in the evening  Easy to access from train station Close to city Centre attractions

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Our room had a problem with the drain in the shower the smell in our room was very unpleasant after the room had been closed up all day The alley outside the window was noisy   The hotel was in easy walking distance of the train station We had an issue with a smell in our room the staff were quick to help sort the problem out The croissants for breakfast were wonderful We loved the map on the wall in our room A great hotel Staff were very good

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The hotel is centrally located the staff is very nice so don t hesitate to ask for recommendation Room are small but confortable the design of the hotel is outstanding

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Terrible value for money no view atall location wasn t described accurately took a good 45 minutes at reception to gain access to my room   I liked the interior of the apartment also the lobby dining area

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I did not like the fact the bathroom and toilet was in a glas walled room with a glass door without lock meaning that on our romantic holiday we had to technically go toilet in full view of each other Did not see the charm in that Especially not after burritos   I liked the hotel itself and location very cozy and staff were friendly and attentive

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nice breakfast buffet Well appointed rooms with interesting decor Very helpful reception desk staff City center and public transportation nearby Quick walk from the train station I would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The food for breakfast was not what I expected It was buffet style and was an added cost of 50 for two   The pictures online were exactly what the room looked like no surprises The staff was very professional friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing in my opinion the rooms were great staff were great winner all round  If u could have taken the bed and shower home with me i would have the bed was super comfy and the overhead shower was spectacular cant rate it high enough 10 out of 10

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Prices were pretty high 250 euro per night but I guess that s typical for downtown Amsterdam   The hotel was in a perfect location for our 4 night stay We were within walking distance of the train station and the Nine Streets area We spent many hours wandering along the canals nearby There was also a tram stop right outside the hotel which we took to the Museum Area Albert Cuyp flea market and Dutch Resistance Museum The hotel had a restaurant and bar area that was convenient for a drink at the end of the day They staff was very friendly and helpful We arrived early and they stored our luggage during the day and were very helpful in suggesting restaurants and offering directions to sights

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing it was perfect   Loved everything about this hotel We walked everywhere from here in minutes Very clean and modern The staff is very helpful Great location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The classic queen room which we stay is extremely small Even it is hard to move two person at the same time   Location is perfect Tram stop is in front of the hotel which is also the main road of the inner circle of Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There were two issues On two mornings of a four day trip I did not receive my requested wake up calls Also staff was NOT great with giving clear directions leading to confusion on two occasions   Room though small was neat and clean Great location Easy for walking and access to Tram

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Airconditioning was abit hard to work in the rooms Drinks at the bar onsite quite expensive   Great location close to everything Very clean hotel friendly helpful staff Very nice room comfortable bed Definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: N A  The staff were extremely friendly and provided a small bottle of presecco and some chocolates for my partners birthday Little touches like that mean a lot They were also able to accommodate and early check in Which was fantastic

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There was a leakage with the shower that caused the carpet near the bed to be damp   The hotel was beautifull really nice beds and the best location u could ask for I would recommend everybody to stay over here

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower leaked a bit   Amazing hotel Great location and decor great attention to detail stylish rooms Friendly and helpful staff We would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The air conditioning didn t go cold enough so the room was quite stuffy which meant we had to open the window this unfortunately meant u heard the noise from the street in the night We did ask the hotel re this they said there is an eco system in the hotel which controls the temperature The bathroom in our room was quite open so you will need to be comfortable with your travel partner The other room in our party had more privacy so if this is a problem for you make this request when you book I would still definitely stay here again though very cool funky   We chose this hotel as it had an elevator for our on the guests in our party The design of the hotel was very modern sleek and brilliantly themed to reflect the previous history of the building as a newspaper office The location was great 5 minutes walk from the central station but far away enough to avoid the noise of the main station buses trams The room was modern clean luxurious Very big comfy double bed Breakfast was lovely Tea coffee juices hot bacon eggs etc cereals pastries cheese meats fish We added this on when we arrived for 20 each which is a little pricey but very nice with great quick service from the staff

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The coffee machine wouldn t work on the day of departure We could hear people talking in the next room from he bathroom That means they could hear us   Hooks in the bathroom to hang more towels bathrobes etc

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There was absolutely nothing to complain about All needs were catered for   Excellent location wonderful staff very comfortable and quiet rooms beautifully decorated Would highly recommend

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We absolutely loved this boutique hotel The location is fantastic especially for first time visitors to Amsterdam it is close to Amsterdam Central Station and has trams directly out the front which are frequent and easy to use The staff are friendly and went our of their way to make our stay unforgettable Special mention to Guest Service Manager who made my son s birthday holiday so wonderful Our twin room was small but comfortable the bed and pillows were amazing and it was very clean We loved our view of the Amsterdam rooftops and listening to the church bells ring Breakfast was good plenty of choice and a lovely environment although a little expensive but standard price for a good hotel We would highly recommend this hotel and would stay there again in a heart beat

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It is very close to Dam Square which is kind of an advantage but also make the area a bit too busy in my opinion If you are looking for a more quire picturesque location I would go a further from the square to the surrounding canals   the hotel is great nice design and practical in terms of location services shopping and restaurants

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The noise of the Hoover in the morning Went on for two hours We asked to move rooms which we did Was on the 1st floor  Enjoyed the location the room was very comfortable Bar and restaurant nice

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The rooms where quite small but this didnt really effect us as we wasnt there for long however of you stayed longer than a weekend or few days this would get a little crowded But it was perfect for our little city break   Beautiful layout lovely staff comfy beds The place was just beautiful A little out the way so your not sat directly on the main high street so your not kept awake by noise all night but only a road away so that in a 2 min walk your slap bang in the centre Its a perfect little location Staff where helpful and understanding The place was incredibly clean and they lay out was perfect Very easy to find I really would recommend this hotel to anyone its classy chic and cool

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 1 Price 2 We didn t bother with the breakfast as the hotel wanted 25e per person simply not worth it  Extremely overpriced for what we received

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not really enough wardrobe space The double doors on the wardrobe are locked obviously for storage and the small end isn t very big Most clothes had to stay in the suitcase as there are no drawers either   Great ambience and very comfy rooms Excellent breakfast with a good choice All the staff are very friendly and attentive

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Disappointed there was no bath in the room Gym It was a disgrace to even call it that it had a rower bike and cross trainer and no treadmill Very poor I just don t think that the hotel represented value for money We paid 375 euros for 2 nights Monday Tuesday with no breakfast included I expected more from the hotel in terms of fitness facilities and the size of the room and to have a bath included Had the room been significantly cheaper then I wouldn t have been as harsh in my critique   Hotel room was very small but the bed was comfy Staff at the reception and hotel bar were very nice and friendly The hotel is in a good location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: An itemised bill would have been easier in English  The beds were comfy but the bedroom was very small The staff were very friendly and we will stay again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No privacy for toilet shower no water source inside toilet eg bidet the room has tiny walking area because of big bed  The bed was huge the area is perfect

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff we so nice and helpful bar area was lovely and the rooms So helpful having a map of the city on the room walls Right in the middle of everything and about a 5 10 minute walk from train station Would highly recommend

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was small and the shower door didn t close properly so flooded into the room after every use The room was very hot and even using the thermostat did nothing Room clean was poor didn t even put the decorative pillows on the bed again or give us clean towels Had the ink hotel salad and it was average advertised it came with flowers no flowers and I complained I would say 3 star not 4   Bed was very comfy staff were nice and the cocktail bar was very good Easy check in and check out Very good location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Rooms are quite small no privacy in bathroom and toilet area so you better hope you re sharing with someone close Also I ve had a bad experiences with them deducting money from my account The cost of two nights plus 50 was held at check in which is standard procedure and fine with me however on check out I paid in full and still 6 days later they haven t released 500 that was held so currently my value weekend away currently cost me over 1000 I ve emailed twice with no reply and had to call to chase I should get my money back however I feel it s important to ensure anyone staying here takes this into consideration I had the available funds but if you don t you might get caught out   Pressroom staff are fantastically helpful the garden outdoor courtyard area Great location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: A bit far from the museums and concert hall   The room and the unique book in the room are both very interesting Through the picture story book I get to know a few interesting stories associated locations in amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Big thanks to the staff of INK Hotel that really made an effort to offer us a memorable stay in Amsterdam In the midst of the hectic life of the most central part of the capital we got a quiet and cozy room filled with surprises for the birthday of my fianc The breakfast buffet was rather pricey but definitely a nice treat with many options also for ppl with allergies My warmest recommendation to travelers who wish to enjoy a piece of European luxury

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was a little small for the price we paid and compared to another hotel we had stayed in previously   Great attention to detail from the staff Room cleaned and well maintained with a fixed UK plug in the room already

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The set up of the bathroom is not a very practical one and our window was facing a wall meaning there was no natural light whatsoever in the room We had non stop noise coming from the alley on the Sunday morning from a machine not really sure if anything could be done about it   Wonderful design of the hotel welcoming staff and very good location for Central Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing negative to say about the hotel  Stylish boutique hotel in a good location with a great bar and delicious food in the restaurant Excellent breakfast and very helpful and friendly staff Would definitely go there again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Gym isn t very equipped no treadmill no 3 and 2 kg weights room is VERY small Maybe it s Amsterdam standard but I found it hard to handle no place to dress comfortably and privately Water was getting out from the shower to the room and it was annoying Plus the mini bar didn t work very well and our food spoiled because of that Overall I think that with 4 stars and such good reviews I expected more   Location wonderful staff espresso machine and bath robe Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Would select a superior room or suite next time and the room was a little in the smal side Could have done with more storage space for clothes   Very stylish excellent friendly staff great central location One in the most comfortable beds I have ever slept in

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing everything was perfect  Very friendly and helpful staff room was lovely and comfortable and spotless and great location and great wifi

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Rooms slightly small but everything needed was available  Hotel design was modern and contemporary Staff extremely helpful with recomendations for food and drinks outside of the hotel Bar staff polite attentive and cocktails amazing

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I tried to book the room with breakfast but could not and mailed to ask if breakfast is included in the rate but got no answer When we got there we were told that breakfast is 20 pp or 25 the next day I also didn t like the fact that they tell you about the tax 5 pp levi upon checkout It feels like it was a hidden cost  The design is great Rooms very clean and bed and pillows very comfortable

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room was stylish and cosy Bed was the perfect for me and my partners Drawing mural of a map of Amsterdam on the wall was a great touch and funny Loved the bar and staff too

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: So the price you pay for the room was nearly 200 a night or more and the size off the room was very small Think maybe lower the price off the room Also some staff where very blunt and assumed we where paying by credit card so it took ages for them to change the payment  The best was comfortable Show was amazing the location was great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The staff in the restaurant were pretty poor which was a bit of a let down after the check in  Check in staff were incredibly helpful and in 5 minutes planned out our weekend s activities

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I cannot think of anything the rooms are perhaps on the small side   The hotel is in an idea location being a short walk from Central Station were were we arrived Dam Square and several of the other main attractions The hotel is clean modern and quirky the staff were all very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The reception desk has received two packages sent to me by mail but has NOT confirmed even I have asked three times along two days Only after I have checked with Amazon France and got the name of the person who received them which as a benefit for such person I will decline to identify perhaps because he she may be not the responsible I have got the confirmation and received them   Everything as expected

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: the door between our room and the next wasn t sound proof we were woken earlier than would like to have been by business people chatting   the location is perfect the staff were helpful the lobby bar is so welcoming you would pay more for less being this central modern interiors there were a mix of what looked like professionals and people having a weekend away it was so quiet for a central location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Great location but stayed in a superior room which was 200 a night and found it quite small Over all clean hotel now staff but quite expensive for what you get

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I found out after booking this on Booking com that the hotel actually had an internal promotion stay a while longer whereby if you booked directly through the hotel for Friday and Saturday your Sunday night was free So always check promotions with the hotel directly Midweek the hotel has networking events this was great if you wanted to joint in set menu and late after party with DJ not so great if you weren t expecting it   The room was amazing we stayed in an executive room and it was worth every extra penny It was our anniversary and after telling the hotel the staff made very special adjustments to the room with chocolates prosecco and a little note Perfect

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room was on the small side considering it was a superior king Didn t ask for an upgrade as we were happy enough Breakfast was quite expensive at 20 each but very nice and plenty of selection   Comfy bed helpful staff great location lovely bar for drinks and relaxing

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Brilliant location less than 5 minutes walk into Dam Square Staff were very friendly and very helpful always happy to help The room was beautiful coffee and tea maker amazing shower room and all toiletries included Would definitely stay again and great value for money

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The staff were really helpful and very nice to deal with As we were celebrating a special occasion Rob the Guest relations manager made it extra special by making the room very welcoming with treats It was a lovely touch and appreciated

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Reception not the warmest Room a bit cramped dirty curtains and no bath   Location room was very small but good Enjoyed our stay staff need to look like they enjoy the place and their guests

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Hallways and landing bit basic rooms small and no privacy in bathroom  Bar and reception very welcoming and nice place to hang out with a drink or coffee

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing we didn t like   Stayed twice in January Amazing place to stay Modern rooms and warm with great customer service throughout the hotel Location is fantastic and the staff couldn t have been kinder and more helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No bath in bathroom no water provided mini bar not stocked limited non existant room service menu over emphasis on design no substance eg Shower door does not fit so bathroom area floods if not careful poor power point location and no international plug point option so remember to bring your adaptor if staying here Limited storage space so if staying more than one night be prepared for a messy room Better value elsewhere in town than Ink sorry to say A  Location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Surprise city taxes charge Also still waiting to have deposit reimbursement  Beautiful hotel Cleanest I ve ever seen Fab molten brown toiletries Fab coffee

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was so small The bathroom had a frosted door so there was no privacy at all Shower had no screen Room wasn t worth 308   Was very clean and in a well known place

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Everything was perfect very modern and beautiful rooms comfy beds great check in service and check out staff are so friendly and helpful location is great team right outside door and dam square right around the corner Everything within walking distance

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The size of our room was too small  Excellent staff restaurant was superb fantastic location for getting around the city with the efficient tram service

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: When we arrived it was around 11 in the morning we hadn t slept in almost 18 hours so we couldn t wait for our bed we were told our room was ready so we rushed upstairs to hop in to our disappointment when we opened the door our room hadn t been attended to since the previous Guests Used bed sheets and towels and rubbish It was quite a disappointment we went back downstairs and brought it to the attention of one of the younger male staff members but he didn t take much interest he just asked did we want our bags taken for a while We told him we saw the cleaners on our floor so we ll come back in an hour we arrived back about an hour and a half later and went up to our room and there was stil no joy Nobody had cleaned it I was more upset at this point as I felt nobody cared about us So we went downstairs and brought it to the attention of a different lady who was extremely helpful and apologetic and tried everything she could to get us a room Sadly there was none available so we had to leave for another hour and come back When we came back an hour later our room was finally real dy We were never so happy to see our bed They were very apologetic and advised this never happens and I understand mistakes happen but i was shocked they didn t offer an apology gesture or something they didn t seem to care very much once we had our room in order It was just Bad start to the trip because we were so tired but it was absolutely beautiful and amazing after that   Fantastic location lovely staff the design of the hotel was incredible and the map on the wall of Amsterdam was actually very helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bathroom was not of a high standard No shower curtain and the shower was over the bath In an Executive room No carperts in the room only a hard floor   Location very frendly staff Interesting room with a history of Amsterdam on the wall Plenty of power points and a huge bed Clean and good air and heating

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The TV not enough English Channels and would of like the option of pay per view movie channels  Staff very helpful and welcoming couldn t do enough to ensure you were having the best time possible location was excellent and so were the cocktails

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was very tiny not what I was expecting at all I had half of an interconnecting room it was really noisy   The vibe of the hotel is great very trendy

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The restaurant no variety of food and staff were rude Wouldn t accommodate any variety and did not listen to requests  Location and reception staff

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Hate hate hate the pillows very tall and very hard and we had no choice to choose anothers  Love the breakfast the location the environment the decoration

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing to do with the hotel but central Amsterdam had a lot of cheap fast food type restaurants Finding the nice ones is a challenge in itself although there are some lovely ones nearby   Fantastic location only 5 minute walk from central station Close to the red light district but far enough away to avoid any noise or crowds Coffee shops galore a stones throw away Very friendly staff Fantastic rooms with extremely comfy beds They even upgraded our room for us as it was a special occasion Would highly recommend

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was small even by European standards But we did not care very much as being in the hotel was just too much fun   The format around printing was interesting and aspiring to us journalists The whimsy expressed by the decor made us feel relaxed and welcome It was just FUN to be at this hotel The staff and I mean everyone was friendly and great to interact with

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bathroom was small and the prices a little high for the size of the room Breakfast room struggled to seat all guests at a peak period  The Ink team are great bed very comfy location is central breakfast was good quality

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: A brilliant central location in Amsterdam Staff were so helpful breakfast was delicious lots of variety rooms were spotless loved the decor Will definitely return and recommend to friends

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Roomsize is very small the room was kind of dark withkut lots of natursl right therefore not worth the money to my mind  Nice located and pretty concept Very comfortsvle bed

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room was quiet small and the cleaning staff opened our door for room service at 7 30 I did not have the do not disturb sign on door but 7 30 is too early   We were celebrating our 13th wedding anniversary which I stated at booking On check in we were greeting with a bottle of champagne and some love heart chocolates in our room lovely touch

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not enough privacy in the bathroom area Some of the staff in the reception were not patient compare to other hotels we visited At the end of the vacation they didn t treat us the same as the beginning   Location Wi Fi and cleanliness

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room and bathroom area is very compact Reasonable if you re traveling as a couple but could be slightly impractical for others  Loved the location The staff at the hotel were incredibly helpful helped us when renting their bikes suggested a few night spots to go to and went out of their way to get us the carrot cake we loved Plus the breakfast was lovely

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower leaked causing water to spread over bedroom floor Room was dusty in places Amenities in room were poor   Bed was very comfortable Food and drink were very nice Staff were very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing   Where do I start From the beginning of our visit to the end this hotel was fabulous The staff are very very helpful and friendly The breakfasts delicious We had dinner on the last night and it was superb The Manager of this hotel should be very proud of his staff

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room service menu could be better with more food choice   The decor is nice and the in room amenities are very well equipped Breakfast is fantastic Lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Breakfast was dry probably due to it not being busy that morning had been stood there for sometime staff addressed it and we only paid for a continental breakfast instead

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Would have liked a bit of a better and more private door between the toilet and the main room as the frosted glass doesn t give much privacy and as ours didn t quite close properly   Lovely polite staff throughout the hotel Great central location for a fantastic price Lovely rooms comfortable cosy and stylish with everything you need We really loved and enjoyed our stay at this hotel and in beautiful Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The beds were extra comfy the breakfast choice was fantastic the quality of the actual food was delicious Overall the hotel are very accommodating I asked for champagne glasses and they came along with some ice when my bag broke I needed help with a mini screw driver to fix this All these little extra things to help make my stay comfortable and enjoyable was an absolute pleasure

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing at all  The attention to detail was great and the fact that the ink staff had made a special occasion of my birthday with prosecco and chocolates certainly gave us the wow factor

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No hairdryers and safe in the rooms My room was not cleaned after my first night stay Came back after a whole day out at 6 pm Wanted to relax before dinner No explanation It was cleaned when I went out in the evening  Location is great One road behind dam square Loved the downstairs of this hotel Very modern Not sure of the black walls in the passages Stayed at this hotel when it was The Convent It s totally changed

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Breakfast was far too expensive at 25 per person We were offered a deal of 20 per person which was still too expensive   Very central location Tram stops outside the door and only 10 minute walk to central station Lovely decor and beds were really comfy Would definitely return

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Layout of bathroom which meant if you got out of the shower anyone in the room could see you   Great breakfast Dark quiet rooms Friendly staff Loved the Wallpaper

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Rooms are extremely small Also the bathrooms have no privacy definitely not good if traveling as a couple Door has no lock and is permanently stuck ajar door is made of glass yeah that was not ideal   Great cocktails at the hotel bar

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I don t have much to complain about if I had to pick something would be the toilet paper in the rooms It s very very thin also maybe they should give a discount voucher to use if you are staying for the restaurant   Mostly everything Location was excellent staff were very friendly didn t hesitate to help One of the best hotels in Amsterdam I ve ever stayed in

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The location while convenient being close to dam square is less than ideal having a major street in front of it instead of a charming canal You also have to cut through some alleys to reach the main streets that lead to dam square   The staff were helpful and friendly They even arranged a house call for a doctor when i was sick The design of the hotel is gorgeous and the rooms are beautiful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Check in was disappointing We were basically given our room keys and told to park the car It is best to do this first as it is not possible to stop close to the hotel Other guests who were dealt with by a different member of staff seemed to be given more time however I did witness staff explaining the hotel etc and showing maps of the local area whereas for some reason we weren t even told the times for breakfast We had to queue for half an hour for the car park Our rooms were ok We paid for the better room whilst the girls had a classic room The rooms are very small and the most annoying part is that there wasn t anywhere to put your belongings which couldn t be hung in the closet We had a sofa but couldn t use it as the bed was right in front The toilet and shower are frosted glass and right next to each other The floor is quite dangerous when wet I slipped twice The fridge in the room is within the drawers of the desk and is incredibly noisy so we kept it turned off Regrettably it was not replenished either We ate in the hotel once in the evening the food was very good and the staff were lovely Breakfast is a but of a free for all I was not offered a hot drink on any of the three mornings Overall this is an ok hotel at best The corridors were quite worn and it certainly wasn t the cleanest hotel we have stayed in It s really a glorified express hotel We had also requested quiet rooms but were woken every morning at 5 45 by noise from the alley way downstairs   The hotel is central although it is a 25 minute walk to the museums The majority of staff are helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Booked a superior room which was 440 for two nights it was a standard in my view so not worth the money that was requested   The blackout window cover was great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We arrived too late for dinner in your restaurant due to flight delays so we ordered your room service pizza To say it was horrendous would be too kind We could have purchased better from the frozen section of a local supermarket It is an insult to your guests to serve such food Room service menus should in our opinion and experience reflect the calibre of your hotel Yours does not Our experience of your room service menu was so awful we were reluctant to even try the menu in your Pressman restaurant and so ate outside the hotel   Your staff are excellent They are welcoming friendly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We stayed at Ink prior to a Viking Christmas Markets cruise It was wonderful centrally located to everything we wanted to visit lovely restaurant bar where we enjoyed a great breakfast each morning along with some of the best coffee we ve ever had and finished the day with a cocktail or two before turning in for the evening Our room was spotlessly clean with a super comfortable bed And the staff were incomparably professional friendly and helpful They intervened in our frantic efforts to locate our delayed luggage contacting local airline representatives to get immediate answers about when we could expect delivery Through their help we received our luggage before we had to depart on our cruise This hotel does indeed deserve an exceptional rating across the board

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No laggeges helpers the receptionist will direct and help you with all your belongings   Beautiful Hotel keys to all attractions perfect location everythings maximum 10 min of walking If I go to AMS again I ll definitely stay at INK Awesome staff with great attitude

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It s very expensive but very high quality I would stay here again if on business but for my personal I d get I prefer something cheaper   Lovely hotel just 10 minutes walk from Central Station Beautiful and quirky yet tasteful interior The best breakfast I ve had in Europe and I m a seasoned traveler This place is perfect for Americans who want a nice quiet American style hotel near everything but not located in the heart of the redlight district

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The staff had a Christmas party in the lobby area They invited us which was very nice One of the employees which I guess didn t know we were invited approched us when we enjoyed some snacks and water roodly asked us to leave the place Well one apple   Great staff great service Great rooms Best breakfast ever Location is great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Perfect location very central could walk to everywhere Beautiful rooms and hotel Great breakfast and welcoming staff Wouldn t change a thing and really made our trip

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: In our room where you poop was 4 feet away from the bed and the glass door in between had 1 inch gap at both sides Also our view was a wall only 20 feet away from our window Not all rooms this bad though Ask for a better one in case   Location and personel were great Lobby design was smart

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: small rooms the bathroom is open to the room which dose not give it enough privacy if you are traveling with friends there is construction next door   location is great easy to get anywhere in the city Great breakfast and nice service

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bed was amazing really comfortable and made me not want to get up the staff were very friendly and nothing was to much they even gave a free upgrade as I was going to propose to my girlfriend Loved every minute of our stay

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bit of an issue on our last morning maintenance walked in the room once early in the morning and actually woke us up and then once again whilst I was getting dressed so felt a bit uncomfortable after that   Staff couldn t do enough bar was quite expensive to drink but that was really across the whole of Amsterdam and the actual products were excellent

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 1 the lady that cleans the room was coming and knock the door 8 9 30am we are a couple that we wake up very early but the second day that we were not answear was knocking again and again i think is better to come after 10 30am at least 2 it will be very comfortabke for us if we had also small bottle of water every day in our room 3 the breakfast can be cheaper 4 the area around the hotel is very expensive a small bottle of water 3euro but if you walk in the next road the are sandwich and other thing in better prices  1 the room was exactly like the photo 2 the lady that cleans the room make a fantastic job and change eveything that is not clean 3 7minutes walk and you are in the central station of amsterdam and 2 minutes walk you are in the center road 4 we have every day coffee and tea milk sugar and was very good quality nesresso 5 the first day we have also 2 small bottle of water 6 the quality of the towels linen was really really good 7 we had a map when we arrive and a very kind men the other persons in the reception was not so smile we have a fantastic time there

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Rooms are tiny didn t like the glass doors on the bathroom toilet they don t give much privacy   Friendly staff comfortable bed really like the flavoured fresh water

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bathrobes I felt were too expensive to take home for the feel and quality of them That the coffee wasn t enough for the duration of one night morning   I liked the warm welcome from the staff very helpful with answering any questions The coffee machine in the room was a great thing to have for a pick me up without much hassle or physical movement at all The open plan bathroom with the glass windows was a great way to give the feeling of more space than there actually was Also bringing more light into the room The free slippers and also the free refreshing fruited water in the lobby The blind on the roof window was easy to use and worked well including the window itself when wanting to view outside and see as much from the rooftops as possible The bed had many pillows and cushions for making yourself very comfortable and relaxed the mattress duvet and sheets were so soft that you d had trouble to get up to turn off the alarm clock which is only a short stretch away The rooms main wall was very instructive and knowledgeable as well as the magazine accompanying it placed on the bedside table from an artist who s work is very interesting

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Quite expensive compared to other hotels in Amsterdam  Hotel has recently been refurbished Location was good takes about 10 minutes to walk to Centraal Station Restaurant and bar in the hotel is good

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: High design with functionality comfort and location Spent an enjoyable weekend in Amsterdam at the INK Loved the restaurant in room coffee among other amenities extremely comfortable bed and friendly staff Would stay again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bed was so comfy they gave us a complimentary bottle of prosecco and a voucher for 2 free drinks at the bar staff were lovely Overall hotel was amazing

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: amazing place amazing location amazing food we loved our stay so much we spent most of our time in the hotel restaurant and bar i would highly recommend this place the bar man Rio was amazing and made us exclusive cocktails every evening the staff at the hotel make you feel like royalty loved it beautiful decor modern spotless rooms very big Location is walking distance from everything we can t wait to come visit again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Everything was fantastic The staff were friendly welcoming and attentive the food was delicious atmosphere calm and chilled the decor was stunning and the bed was the comfiest ever

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bathroom was slightly disappointing Not because of the cleanliness or facilities but the design was too ultra modern based on open plan We were there for 4 days and found that in some areas design had superseded the practicality of certain obvious necessities such as more drawers in the bedroom so that items could be stowed away I would categorise the hotel as a transit hotel therefore after 4 days you could pick faults which after all would not bother short stay guests   The hotel was very central and within easy walking distance to places of interest within the old town An excellent tram service was available right outside the main entrance with only one stop to the main railway station Food in the restaurant for breakfast and dinner was absolutely excellent the latter could have been Michelin starred it was so good Very unusual decor inside which I found very interesting as the interior designer had introduced all kinds of typographics to echo the previoususe of the building as a newspaper office

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not much privacy in bathroom for two people sharing due to glass partitions instead of walls Stylish but impractical bathrooms   Pleasant helpful staff Good location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Toilet wasn t private enough it has a frosted glass window and you can hear everything  Ultra trendy boutique really central staff excellent comfy bed

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We were not happy that our original room looked onto a wall but staff were very accommodating and charming and moved us to a room on the top floor with a view Room and bathroom linked very well with glass Very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: While the quality of the bedroom was excellent nevertheless we would have appreciated a few more square feet There was a bit of to me to you when my wife and I were negotiating wardrobe and bathroom wc doors when considering the room rate   Really comfortable double bed Very contemporary style to the entire hotel Staff very efficient and helpful Dined one night in the restaurant and was not disappointed Great location only several minutes away from the main Central Railway station

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Was so annoyed about the breakfast bento box we ordered Description stated sausage and bacon but we received mushroom and bacon which wasn t even on the menu and I am allergic to mushrooms 25 well wasted on breakfast The hotel also took extra money out of my bank account as security which would ve been fine if they didn t do it without telling me   Nice clean room

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Sadly room 127 is looking out into the gap between 2 buildings without daylight facing a dirty wall and the neighbors windows at 1m away Rooms like this cannot demand the premium price I paid They should be listed as special offers due to their handicap and be clearly called out in the booking options It s common practice elsewhere to have a higher rate for ocean view vs city view There should be a no view bargain offer Also the hotel could work with its brilliant designers architects to find a creative solution a coat of White paint on the neighboring building for example to compensate brighten the outlook from the rooms on this side of the building Clean bright curtains would help too the ones in room 127 were grey and had not been cleaned in a while To sum it up my experience was considerably impacted by the absence of daylight and the view into a dirty dark creepy crevasse With so much effort spent on the overall design this was a real let down   I loved the overall ambience created by the lovely interior design choice of colours materials and graphics in the lobby restaurant bar and rooms

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: the price for buffet breakfast was 25 euros  very modern rooms big soft beds staff very friendly only 3 min walks from dam square and only 10 mins walk from the station location is spot on

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Relatively limited space Some consistent humming noises possibly the room was not the best class of rooms Service of restaurant was good on the surface only   Location location location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: nothing  the staff was amazing so helpful the breakfast was perfect and the room was super clean the location was amazing close to everything you need in the city would recommend all my friends to stay at INK

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Had a twin room and a double the twin was much smaller   Lovely hotel well appointed in an old newspaper building Very convenient for the station cruise terminals and scenic parts of Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The photos shown at info of the hotel are deceptive The hotel rooms were way tinier than the pics shown We couldnt even put our luggages and bags to a proper place The restroom and the shower have no sense of privacy which would make it extremely difficult for newlyweds and couples Room service is incapable of carrying out even the most simplest orders We asked for a fresh fruit in the evening and couldnt get any because the guy at the reception told us that the chef in kitchen cant prepare a fruit plate The rooms are very claustrophobic The reception who is also responsible for concierge and guest relations made us felt like they would only recommend the restaurants that they would make a commission It wasnt worth the money at all Never again   The location was good It was walking distance to the main attractions in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: All the staff were very friendly and helpful The breakfast is to die for loads of choice big buffet Huge comfy bed Very modern looking Fully stocked bar Great location Great place Would stay again Would recommend to others

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There was a distinct shortage of space in the breakfast room meaning on our final morning the staff had to improvise and put 6 of us 3 non related couples in a side room I have to say that I think it is a bit over priced frankly   Location is excellent only 1 or 2 streets back from the Damrak so very central Staff were polite and courteous and room was clean tidy and comfortable Certainly a very stylish hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff were lovely the hotel is stunning well worth the extra money If you go for the breakfast option you will not be disappointed there is something for everyone and as much as you like

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing at all   The Ink is conveniently located with less than a 10min walk to Central Station and a 5 min walk to Dam Square Good tram links from both The staff at Reception were so helpful with queries about public transport good restaurants nearby storing luggage etc Even help printing out boarding cards prior to departure Breakfast is superb and most definitely worth including in the room rate Everything about the hotel is lovely comfy beds and quiet rooms with plenty of personal touches upstairs and down My teenage son thought it was brilliant too A real oasis to return to after a busy day sightseeing If returning to AMS I would definitely choose to stay here again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bar men were really friendly remembered us and asked what we d been up to and made recommendations on places to visit and eat The hotel is in a great location too and is really quirky My second stay here and would highly recommend

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The breakfast area quite small and often had to wait to be seated   Excellent choice of breakfast cooked or continental plus pastries cereals and juices Very good

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: In general in Amsterdam the hotels had bad quality price a little expensive  Is in the centrum of the city Near the central station Confortable The staff fantastic

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It was a little pricey but for what you get and where it is I still think it was worth it   The room was really comfortable the location was great and the staff was very helpful and attentive

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I can t think of anything  The restaurant serves amazing food Very talented chefs The staff clearly enjoy working at this beautiful stylish hotel They were so very friendly welcoming and always ready to chat about Amsterdam life

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The smallest double room I think I ve ever occupied and it was expensive There was no view the window was sealed and the air conditioning appeared to be working but wasn t   Although boutique hotels and their gimmicks don t appeal to me this was well placed in the city and very well maintained

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Very comfortable bed lovely thick bath robes and nice toiletries Breakfast although not cheap had an extensive selection and the coffee was excellent Quirky wallpaper

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Locations are superior executive actual room executive was really small it isn t high class just regular for everything in it We have traveller a lot and for our experience it s only locations not a site

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff were polite but didn t build up a rapport at all I felt they could have been a little more informative explained the facilities available such as bar times etc If they had we would have been more inclined to eat drink at the hotel The bed was really uncomfortable I woke up with a sore back after our two night stay   I liked the fact we were able to leave our case after we had checked out could collect it later on that day I liked that we had a nespresso coffee machine in the room Also that the hotel was very clean in all areas

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room is a bit small we got creative on where to put our open luggages   Funky rooms with great location that s close to everything We loved the wallpaper

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room little small diffilcult to open our suitcase It would be good to know in advance how to park because if you arive first time you are lost  Very friendly check in All staff extremely friendly Very young design with sence of humor Dinner quality excellent but to mix individual couples and party group is not good idea should be little separated it was noisy Breakfast good quality and presentation most staff attentative passion fruit smoothie and home made cakes different every day Location just perfect close to all POI and walking distance Comfortable bathrobe

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Funky modern bedrooms with nice features like a Nespresso machine Seriously comfortable beds and great showers Friendly informative staff and very welcoming

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was amazing the staff couldn t help you enough the bar area was very clean and there was a great atmosphere Food in the restaurant was fab Highly recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The division in the bathrooms are very modern but not too practical Breakfast too expensive 25 per person   Very nice decoration in a coompletely renewed hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Probably the hotel s only fault was its lack of a computer accessible to guests   The breakfasts were splendid but what really set this hotel apart for me was its design modern chic with lots of edgy art works

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower leaked if you didn t have it just right but not bad   We went to Amsterdam as part of our honeymoon My husband was skeptical about letting me choose the hotel we stayed in since I am the frugal one but we were both blown away with the service we received The staff decorated our room with a ton chocolate hearts everywhere There was even a rose and a champagne bottle waiting for us Everyone was incredibly friendly and always smiling The breakfast was delicious The coffee was incredible I am a vegetarian and my husband is pure carnivore and we were both very happy We went back for breakfast everyday it was so good including after going out to find somewhere new we returned to the hotel for the breakfast we really wanted The atmosphere is great and the design is unique and so cool We loved our stay and miss Amsterdam already

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I wouldn t say the rooms were exactly cosy or very good value for money but it s a boutique hotel   It was clean and very stylish The bed was very large and comfortable We got a nespresso machine with free coffee and free water in the fridge The air conditioning was very welcome

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We did have to call multiple times to get out 50 Euro holding deposit down which wasn t acceptable The hotel admitted fault but it s still not good enough   Lovely hotel and staff

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room top floor was a little small due to the slope of roof   Good central location close to transport and various attractions Hotel in good condition throughout

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: All pillows and bedding need to be washed as we found a drop of dried blood on one of our pillows   Great location made it easy to get around Staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower door squeaked very loudly so there was no showering quietly if your partner is sleeping but not a big deal Wish there was a sheet to cover with when it got hot rather than just a comforter but that may be a European thing   Although the room is on the smaller side it s very well fashioned and we felt like we had plenty of space Bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
