Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing  The hotel d cor was very modern which I love The location was close to everything train station canals restaurants Anne Frank house etc The staff was always very pleasant They even decorated our room for our special occasion including proseco and chocolates which were a nice surprise The bed and room were very comfortable The restaurant in the hotel called the pressroom was so good that we ate there 3 times in 2 days The food had top quality and presentation I would definitely stay there and eat there again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: For nightly price we paid could have included breakfast as part of deal   Newly renovated well appointed room and bathroom Hotel allowed us after prior e mail request to book into our rooms as soon as we arrived 2 hours early after 30 hours of international air travel Staff including cleaning staff all genuinely happy and very helpful Cleanliness

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The moment we stepped in we loved it My husband I stayed here for three nights The former home of the Dutch newspaper the design unique quirky Loved the scribbles on the walls of the room Spacious clean modern comfortable room Even though it was right smack in the heart of Amsterdam when you are in your room it was quiet peaceful Great location Minutes to the train station canals and points of interest The staff exceptional Friendly courteous helpful and have a great sense of humor Had a wonderful memorable stay

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The rooms were the smallest I have stayed in only really ideal for a single person No privacy from the W C and shower into the room   The location was fantastic

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Great location great staff I was there on a stag do and they had a good attitude with us We all said we would come back with our good ladies if we returned to Amsterdam The reception smelt like a Four Seasons too

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The prize of the breakfast A member of staff at reception making a rude joke about my surname pretty sure that wouldn t have happened if I d been male General mood of staff seemed uninterested   Great location in the heart of Amsterdam Being able to rent bicycles directly from the hotel Quiet at night and close to central station

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There is a range of rooms which all sound like they would be superior But the space in the rooms bathrooms cupboards are all a bit squeezed into a fairly tight space This was in the case in our Superior Executive Room Supposedly three up the scale   Even at a discount of 20 euros breakfast was expensive

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower door don t close perfectly and wet the bathroom floor  the confort the theme ink No need map it was on the wall with funny comments pleasant to read hahaha Situation between central station and centre

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Can t think of anything to improve   Great location in the middle of the Central City Could walk everywhere Room was very nicely appointed Liked the drawings on the wall Staff was very friendly and helpful Good value especially for location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Hotel was very secure Rooms were compact but had all the amenities Beds were very comfortable The staff were extremely helpful and knowledgable helping all the tourists navigate Amsterdam Great location walking distance to Dame Square with transportation available in front of building 15 minute train ride from airport to Dame Square I m sorry we didn t accept the breakfast offer as it would have been much more value for our dollar as they offer a buffet with unlimited choices and coffee Would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing  Great location Fabulous staff incredibly friendly and helpful Very comfortable beds Amazing breakfast Overall a wonderful stay in a quirky and striking hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The lighting in the bathroom was a bit dim for putting on makeup  Bed was comfortable room was a good size loved the mural on the wall Front desk staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The price of breakfast seemed very high for what was included Drinks at the bar were also super expensive as compared to other places nearby   Fantastic hotel right in City Center The rooms were clean and comfortable and the staff was very friendly Appreciated the free wifi complimentary bottles of water and the fitness center

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: This property is ideally placed and all the staff were so friendly and helpful The rooms are not overly large but so well planned that it works Particularly like the wall paper telling story of area Restaurant excellent and so helpful to my wife who is coeliac

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room size a little small and weekend rate quite pricey This is not exactly a luxury hotel but a small trendy well designed comfortable boutique hotel   Great find Smallish executive room but well planned so everything to hand Really comfy beds Staff were super friendly bar area relaxed and inviting to either eat drink or just chill after a day out Great location for Central station Dam Sq would stay again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Booking com s exchange rate is a bit dodgy the hotel turned out to be more expensive not the hotel s fault because Booking com quote in Sterling but you re charged at the hotel in Euros and the two figures bear little resemblance Make sure you look at the small euro figure and not the large sterling price quoted by this website   One of the nicest hotels I ve stayed at I noticed it has won an award for best Amsterdam hotel in 2016 and I m not surprised Staff are very helpful wifi is excellent the whole place is really clean bed and shower are excellent too Breakfast was great with friendly service Step out of the hotel cross the road and keep heading west on foot and in five minutes you are in Jordaan a wonderfully picturesque area with small cafes and shops and atmospheric streets One of the main shopping streets with high shops like Zara and H M but also Hema which has nice stationary and stamps which make great presents for kids runs along the rear of the hotel handy but rather generic I walked everywhere museum district is 30 minutes so after an exhausting day it was great to return to such a nice place And just 10 minutes on foot from Central Station

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We booked a luxury room with king size bed but the size of room is very limited so that we could not open the big luggage properly It is far from my understanding of luxury room The glass partition for bathtub doesn t work functionally which is too short to block the water coming out So the part of bathroom is easily wet I think it is not a good solution as we shall find the balance between art and feasible solution   It has good design and decoration and he breakfast is very organic and multiple optional The location is very good where you could find very good restaurant nearby The staff are always helpful and kind of guest

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing to dislike at this excellent hotel   INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery is an excellent hotel Wonderful location in the center of the city with good access to public transportation Reception staff is very gracious friendly and exceedingly helpful with good suggestions about restaurants day trips and other travel matters which they facilitate very efficiently Hotel is very clean household staff courteous and Pressroom restaurant is quite good This is a hotel that we will certainly return to on our next visit

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Private bathroom would have been better  Loved the location The room was lovely comfy bed super clean spacious and perfect temperature Hotel staff were always extra helpful all round amazing hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: nothing you have it nailed   Bed incredibly comfortable room was clean and loved the wall drawings Staff all very helpful great location superb breakfast

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Very small bedroom room no storage So little space the safe was in the bathroom It was OK for one person but very tight for two We requested a bath instead of shower when we booked several months in advance No one got back to us to tell us there were only baths in the executive rooms and extra 65 euros a night Housekeeping poor The bathroom door which was about twelve inches away from the bed squeaked so loudly we had to ask for it to be oiled within minutes of arriving which was done quickly We had t ask for facecloths and shampoo which were not replaced after the first night The shelf in the shower meant for toiletries was at such an angle it was impossible to use We stayed at this hotel when it was the Convent it has undergone a major refurbishment and is now very minimalist and trendy and obviously geared towards business people We would not go back We did not think it was good value   Location 5 minutes from Central Station and Dam Square UK power and USB points in the room Plenty of power points Thick dressing gowns and nice towels and great shower Very friendly pleasant and helpful staff Good breakfast but very expensive if not included in the rate Air Con not very effective and got very warm as the room was so small No extraction in the bathroom so steamed up very quickly

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Air conditioning rattled shower drain didn t drain properly so couldn t take a shower longer than 5 minutes without making a mess Also very damp humid in the hotel   Friendly staff great location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing  I loved the size of the bed and how I was able to blank out all the noise and light I loved the design and layout of the room Will be gong back hopefully in December

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We had dinner at the hotel and me and my gf both had same thing The presentation was amazing and mine tasted great unluckily though my gfs meal was abit undercooked We didn t say anything until after because we didn t want to cause any problems   Overall vibe is great super friendly staff and lovely comfy bed

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff were extremely friendly and couldn t have been more helpful our luxury King room was lovely We definitely chose one of the best hotel in the area

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing It was fantastic   The staff were all AMAZING I have never met a more friendly or accommodating staff in any hotel anywhere The location was great too We celebrated my daughter s birthday at the Pressroom restaurant in the hotel and they did an outstanding job I will certainly stay here again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The twin room was very small with no hooks in the bathroom for towels or robes We were moved to a slightly bigger room but had I not been with my sister the facilities had no privacy and were way too intimate   Most of the staff were excellent helpful and friendly We had problems at check in with a staff member who didn t know the protocol for taking swipes of credit cards The hotel is cool and quirky and very well located for the Central Station Dam Square and canals

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Accor did not give us points since we booked on bookings com And that s a really big issue Also the bike rental could be cheaper and option for kid seat  Super staff Theme Hotel Warm comfy rooms Tram stop across 10 mins Walk to Centraal station I ll stay here again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The pillows were very odd shaped and 4 days later I still have a very painful neck injury from the last night of stay at the hotel Pillows are normally rectangular and flat so as not to cause injury A pity because the hotel is good otherwise   INK is in a great location and is handy to attractions tour bookings and facilities like laundromat and convenience store There is a one drawer fridge which is handy for milk or water in the room We used it a lot because we only drink bottled water on our international trip Also having real milk instead the UHT crap for tea was a blessing

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Pretty much perfect but would have been nice for a few extras to be included in the room or upon arrival  Comfy beds lovely quirky rooms modern gorgeous boutique hotel with great bar cocktails and food Great staff too as well as excellent location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Buffet breakfast at 25 is overpriced especially since we ate only criossants and coffee One member of staff at breakfast did not seem to have been trained very well and appeared a tad surly Free water in the room would have been a nice gesture   General ambience of the hotel Very modern and contemporary Overall friendliness genuine helpfulness and efficiency of staff they actually appeared to enjoy working at your hotel Surprisingly high quality food at dinner evening in the restaurant Location is perfect for a weekend sightseeing in Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The only thing it lacked was some outdoor space to relax in when the weather was good   The staff at the Ink was amazing so friendly and helpful They made us feel welcome and were responsive to all our requests The hotel is modern and stylish Our rooms were cute clean and very comfortable although some didn t have great views

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Very Small Size of Room Breakfast Varieties we had requested a King size bed and when we checked in we found that they dont have King size beds   Location is very near to central Station and Dame Square with almost a Tram Station infront of the Hotel so you can go every where easily Most of the Staff are very Helpful Breakfast was average

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Very clean room with a fantastic comfy bed Lovely nespresso coffee in room Easy access to central station and near all the best attractions yet very quiet and peaceful area Perfect

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing could have been better If we stayed longer we might have eaten in the restaurant Nothing to complain about at all   Very modern and clean hotel There was a friendly staff to greet us We got a drink at the bar late and were very happy to find the library where we could talk over some drinks

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Lack of privacy for bathroom Design of main door from bedroom to bathroom caused it to not fully close Partial glass door wall on shower so bathroom floor always wet after shower   Great location clean and comfy beds Well presented Friendly and helpful staff Coffee and tea provided in room Good wifi

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room could have bee a bit bigger but then I m being really picky   Great location and staff service were excellent Great bar downstairs too

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There was a sock under the bed when we first entered the room Didn t like that there were some marks on the wall   Bathroom was clean beds were comfy Good location restaurant food was nice Staff were also friendly

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room and bathroom are a bit too small and more closet space would be nice   This is a really funky hotel with a great modern design Location near the central station with tram and bus lines accross the street The staff are amazing super friendly and helpful The breakfast is plentiful and delicious The rooms and bathroom are clean and modern

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: no recommendations   the bed was so comfortable staff were extremely friendly smooth check in and check out process it was so hip chic and modern and the location was perfect

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The hotel was nice My only complaint was that our room was not availailbe for us to check in until after 6 00 pm Since our flight arrived early we had our luggage held since that morning and came back in the afternoon There should have been no reason for our room not to be ready by check in time 2 00 pm Also note if you are not traveling with someone very close to you the bathroom did not have a separate door to provide privacy for showering open to room area   Friendly helpful staff Clean nice hotel Fun wallpaper Espresso machine in room Close to Dam Square

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The beds were unbelievably comfy the staff were so helpful and polite and the hotel was in the best possible location Would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone staying in Amsterdam and I will definitely going back

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Despite do not disturb we were woken by room service at 8 10am 225 per night for a Monday and Tuesday simply does not represent value for money At check in I was told that the 225 oer night excluded breakfast and when I challenged this as value for money I was told at check in weclome to Amsterdam prices which is far from the customer service expected of this chain The layout of the rooms is odd the superior king room was completely dominated by the superior king bed the separate toilet was very small and claustraphobic and the shower leaked onto the floor outside which given the floor wasn t the bathroon due to the open plan payout was pretty poor Better hotels avasilable in better lcoation for far better money   Bed extremely comfy hotel very modern and boutique style

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The design of the hotel was very hip Attentiveness of staff from prior to arrival answering and providing solution to our enquiries as well as questions we have during our stay Location was excellent a few minutes walk from Dam Square Breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: On the last night before flight home there was party downstairs and we were invited to this function but with a young son it was not appropriate However the DJ music was so loud that me and my son did not sleep until 1am and had to be up at 5am for flight home Although we did not attend the party it felt like we were there with our hotel room vibrating I did complain along with other guests and the music eventually switched off at 12 30am with no compensation for this in convenience If I wanted a club night I would have gone out   Location was great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: For premium rooms we were disappointed to have no baths only showers Also there were no facilities whatsoever for storing clothes only a small hanging wardrobe which meant that it was not possible to unpack shirts pullovers etc which had to remain in the suitcases   Extremely attentive and kind staff

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Very modern location in a historic setting located just a 5 minute walk from the Center of Amsterdam Loved the rain shower and the great bathrobes

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff were very helpful and informative Room and d cor were modern and comfortable We had an excellent stay walking distance to station metro and centre of town

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Breakfast was expensive extra Misleading websites gave impression there was a pool and hotel overlooked canal whereas it was on busy road   Quiet room Comfy bed Nice public spaces including bar and patio area Very clean and large bathroom Excellent staff on reception Easy location to walk to main tourist spots or catch a tram The themed decor was a nice change and the graffiti drawing on bedroom wall very clever and amusing Kettle and fridge in room welcome

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: the room service menu do not have great choices It was quite a busy morning hence why perhaps but there were no host at the entrance of the restaurant for breakfast so i had to approach a member of staff myself to give my room number   the history of the building and the concept Cleanliness and comfort of the bed and pillows Bathroom amenities of quality Great croissants and selection of bread The juice bar idea in the lobby Staff uniform very original Design of the room and comfort brilliant

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The double room was too small for us we paid extra and had a deluxe room Would of been nice to have a few drawers under the large desk or by the bedside table it did lack storage space   We ate breakfast and evening meal in the restaurant the evening meal was fine dining wonderful 10 10

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not a problem for me but some guests sharing a room may find the open layout of the bathroom to be a little too exposed to the rest of the room   The whole staff from the front desk to the restaurant and the housekeeping were all absolutely lovely The public spaces are welcoming and my executive room was spacious and well designed Both breakfast and dinner in the restaurant are excellent Centrally located and easily accessible

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Unfortunately doors leading to the rooms continually banged shut through the night Also the doors leading to the shower and toilet had a tendency to bang if they were not held while shutting All this noise lead to very broken sleep during my stay  sraff were friendly the hotel was clean and tidy

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 209 for one Sunday night was a little expensive I feel View was poor although we were probably just unlucky   Excellent hotel one of the best I ve stayed Keeping the newspaper theme adds character Facilities in the room excellent including layout and old style telephone and free to use Nespresso machine

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: the reception was jammed on a sunday morning and it took very long to do the check in breakfast not included at 25 euros is too expensive for what you get I have been in other hotels of the same category and breakfast buffet was definitely better

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: smallest room I have ever stayed in my life shower box without door always flooded the bathroom when taking a shower Too expensive for such a small room  great location modern and edgy looking hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bathroom set up quite unusual Fine for a couple but may not work so well for friends Breakfast a bit expensive   Bed very comfy very creative room decor beautiful smelly candles in reception area

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The breakfast Price is excessive 25 It is 3x cheaper anywhere around the hotel Street works made it a bit noisy in the early morning   Location is ideal to get to know the city Center Staff is very kind and helpfull at any time

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: A mirror in addition to the one in the bathroom would have been a simple and appreciated addition Also a few more hooks for towels bathrobes etc would have been nice   Clean quiet room in central location Excellent breakfast Helpful and friendly staff

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Potentially could have had more staff on the front desk at times   Beautiful hotel gorgeous interior clean smells amazing Staff are so friendly and accommodating It is an expensive hotel but I would definitely stay there again worth the money The location was absolutely perfect too no more than a 10 minute walk away from everything apart from the museum quarter which was accessed by the tram stop directly outside the hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Cocktails quite expensive A happy hour would have been super   Beautifully clean boutique hotel wonderful lounge bar cocktails and amazing breakfast Nothing was too much trouble for the very professional staff

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bathroom itself as we were just friends it was a bit awkward trying to shower and get changed as there is no bathroom door separating the room Although It would be perfect for couples   Hotel was in the perfect location Very clean Staff very friendly Very quite

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not a criticism but rather a suggestion The garden area would benefit from a tiered canopy system Still remains bright and airy but less susceptible to rain See Tiger Lily Edinburgh   All of it Staff were particularly courteous Will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We stayed in executive room which was great but our friends had standard room which was very small   The staff and location are brilliant for visiting Amsterdam Hotel design is quirky and fun

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There were a few disappointing aspects Firstly the view or lack there of The only view was of a wall of the back of a building a couple of metres away which actually made the room rather dark This was an unpleasant surprise as I d paid extra for a superior double presuming that would increase the chances of a better view and I had requested if possible a view upon booking Secondly at breakfast there were a number of issues Both days we had to wait a while to be seated as there was not enough room We were not told about breakfast finishing early on the Sunday due to an event in the hotel Luckily we arrived half an hour before breakfast was due to finish however it appeared the hotel staff were clearly prioritising the event over their clientele as staff cleared most of the pastries and all of the juices away half an hour before breakfast was due to finish in order to get ready for the event so we missed out on some items I noticed some dinners missed out on hot food altogether Also getting a cup of coffee is quite difficult at breakfast time Dirty coffee cups were also left in our room after the first day and the air conditioning did not seem to work well So there were a few niggles which were disappointing for the price but we have great memories of our time here   Ink hotel takes cool to a whole new level The whole hotel is so stylish and edgy All the staff be it the concierge the bar staff or the cleaning are so amenable and helped us book excursions The rooms certainly have the wow factor The drinks at the bar are second to none the bar is certainly worth a visit even if you are not staying at the hotel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower door didn t close properly so the floor got wet   Overall comfortable and nice hotel in a good location The bartenders were very friendly and made excellent drinks

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing such an amazing experience   Absolutely amazing hotel and in a great location I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone The hotel room service food was absolutely amazing If or when my husband and I go back to Amsterdam we will definitely be stay at this location again it was such a delightful experience the hotel even has umbrellas and bikes for the guest they think of everything My husband and I went there for part of our honeymoon and the staff suprised us with chocolates and a little bottle of champagne it was so nice The room it self was big with beautiful furnishings I stole some ideas for my own condo hehe They also have a giant wall with the map of the neighborhood on it which was very helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There is nothing that I can say that I didn t like Location was great with a tram right in front of the hotel   My wife and I went to Amsterdam as our last trip before the baby is born The staff treated her and I wonderfully they recommended restaurants let us borrow an umbrella on the rainy day never said no to anything we asked for The rooms are small not too small but super trendy and functional clean and provide you with robes slippers Nespresso tea along with the other typical hotel ammenities The breakfast that was included was very good and you could order unlimited hot drinks and staff again was very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Breakfast was good but but busy and service slightly slow because of it but nothing was too much for the staff and they did everything with a smile The whole print theme is fab the staff are dressed in funky aprons   Rooms are excellent Modern fun and vibrant Beds are huge and extra comfy too Staff are so smiley and pleasant the Dutch are super friendly I think location is superb as you can reach all areas easily you are in the middle But hotel is really great you can t go wrong with this place worth the money to get a decent room

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The fact that I paid for the hotel with cash and your still holding it with my bank 4 days later  Friendly lady at reception I lost my baggage at the airport and she was very helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Can t think of anything we didn t like   We loved everything about it location comfy bed modern decor friendly staff great food and drinks comfortable common areas lounge

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There are no cupboards in the room just a small wardrobe so nowhere to put clothes we lived out of our suitcases which sat on the floor or fixed seating limiting the space you have   The location is very good

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The fridge in the room was quite noisy but at least I could turn it off at night time   Really nice hotel Quite a spacious room considering it wad Amsterdam on the top floor Very friendly staff Amazingly good breakfast so many options and very tasty

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing   Superb room great restaurant and bar and very helpful friendly staff A 10 minute walk from Central Station and close to all the main sights Wonderful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I really think they got their colour scheme wrong Walking out of the elevator to black corridors was a bit depressing I know it s supposed to represent the INK but it really doesn t work   The staff were very friendly and helpful The hotel is very close to train station just one stop on the tram also very close to the centre There was a great choice for breakfast and great service from the breakfast staff The room was very clean and comfy

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower had a small leak to the bathroom floor No big deal   This hotel is very cool The design is super modern but not in a bad way Really stylish Rooms are standard size again very modern feel and great wall art Bed amazing Really Shower great There is a restaurant in the lobby which looks very good but I haven t had a chance to eat there

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Genuinely it was all great All the little things were done   Even with the central location INK wasn t cheap but wow it s worth every penny It walks that think line between Arty and Classy so the room felt very cool The wall had had drawn honest maps of Amsterdam on them which was great for planning our walks Bar drinks and nibbles were good loads of fresh juice and water available though we skipped breakfast 25 If you are looking for something special that will make you appear to have put in even more thought than you have This is the one

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: My Superior room had a view straight into someone s bed and he didn t close his curtains so I couldn t look out Perhaps Superior rooms should have a better view   The quirky bedrooms with little extra touches were great The staff were extremely professional and courteous The hotel had a cosy but contemporary feel

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Although the front entrance is swept it would be better to have a cigarette bin out front as it gets untidy with cigarette ends  Rooms were great food excellent bar grest staff excellent

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Spaces are small and narrow just like anywhere in Amsterdam After the first site we changed our classic room to a luxury one for extra money of course but that was not really luxury either Not the one you see on the photo Amsterdam is very filthy why don t they put waste bins in the streets   Modern design nice and creative lobby area friendly staff Food is awesome in the hotel compared to the not so high Dutch standard The city has a very individual atmosphere

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Too warm the in room air con didn t do anything to cool room down was very stuffy Given the room cost breakfast was an additional 25 when it should have been included For some reason bathroom door when shut left gaps on both sides of door not ideal if traveling with others as no privacy   Very friendly helpful staff at reception Good bar with delicious range of cocktails Handy to Centraal station

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: great location friendly staff clean well designed rooms central location is a good base to explore the city the whole place kept to a high standard

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bad If you re a family with baby ies there is little infrastructure in place for them We were pretty much forced to move to a more expensive room at check in so a hotel provided crib could fit The crib was not very child friendly several plastic pointy edges and the hotel did not have baby seats at their restaurant Elevators were small and slow Eventually one of the only two of them they had broke down so it made things even slower At some points in the day check in and check out there was a cue for the elevators The hotel room was nice but it was more focused on being hip than it was on providing comfort At a point it became full of little nuisances that made it a bit less of a great experience It is still a very good place to stay and good value for your money   The good The staff was outstandingly helpful and nice The restaurant is very good The hotel is clean and very well located

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bar staff were incredibly slow It wasn t that busy and getting a drink was a bit of a mission   The front of house staff were very helpful though

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Booked this Hotel for my Parents 30th Anniversary present The staff could not do enough for them They went above and beyond to make their stay pleasant My parents were so happy with the Hotel Room and actually stated that it was the nicest hotel they ever stayed in They said they will return again and they are quite hard to please sometimes They could not say enough about it They also stated that the breakfast was amazing and they loved the bar too So if you are thinking of going to Amsterdam Do not pass this hotel Ruth Ireland

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room too small Booked for two but closet does not fit one persons clothes No concierge help Receptionist gave us wrong address for restaurant And staff didnt clean the floor after we reported that we spilled juice  Nicely designed Cool courtyard

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing   Checked in on Hogmanay to find we had been upgraded twice We stayed in room 545 and cannot express how perfect it was We love our comfort and we weren t disappointed Adored the Soft atlas of amsterdam so much i bought my own copy Thank you so much for your hospitality best weekend EVER

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Could not fault anything   The staff are outstanding The room was big and spotless Just 5 minutes from Central Station Room service Great breakfast

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I had paid for superior room with breakfast included but I was given standard room and the receptionist act like she didn t know that my breakfast was paid so she tried to offer me a good deal for the breakfast   Location

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: hospitality of cleaning staff need to be improve TV Channel need to add the english language channel   room facility especially power connection map on the wall front desk staff very nice word of daily note on the black board

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The lifts were quite slow for some reason and occasionally you have to wait a while on them   The staff at reception the bar and the restaurant were great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 1 I booked the room with breakfast but when I checked in there is no breakfast inclusive This is still fine until the hotel charged different amount from what I booked thru booking com I sent a complain letter to the hotel the response was very unfair Please double check what you booked and what you get overthere 2 They did not clean the coffee mugs and glasses for 3 days 3 The tea selection was empty I asked for a refill but never come 4 The room was not the same with the pictures in booking com It was much more smaller and bad ugly view   Location is pretty closed to the city central and main station

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Waiting time for Breakfast to few tables   Location very central walking distance to almost any point of interest Staff is very Helpful DJ Friday Saturday in Bar Lounge very nice We enjoyed our stay a lot

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bedroom was a little small and not sure about the frosted glass doors to the toilet   Location couldn t of been better Staff were very friendly and the facilities were great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bar a bit pricey  Lovely quirky hotel in a fab location near trains and shops Loved the atlas on the bedroom walls Staff were extremely helpful and friendly Loved the robe slippers and complimentary toiletries

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room 128 Back end of the hotel From around 6 30am the staff were downstairs outside making loads of noise Not possible to get a all night sleep here And not happy that room faced a wall and this was a superior room Wouldn t like to see a standard No bath just a shower Stayed before in Sofitel the grand the room were much more comfortable   This is a modern hotel and staff was friendly The hotel was lively and bar was great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We was put at the back on our own out of the way I tried to settle the bill upon arrival I was told it was hotel policy to take payment on checkout the next day I was told I had to pay straight away this was at8pm I did not feel comfortable taking that amount of money from the machine in the evening so I waited until the next day however staff stopped our room key from working so we had to pay was made to feel like we was not posh enough to stay at this hotel Bad experience

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not a bad experience for me but I can imagine that the twin room with the open bathroom is not suitable for people who are not close to each other like colleagues   The way the small space of the room was used in such a useful and comfortable way everything was there very practical Comfortable beds

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We ran out of toilet roll and tea bags in the room and even though we asked reception twice nothing appeared   Location was great and the beds were comfirtable

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Had a poor experience in the bar Asked for a chocolate martini Waited a long time finally received a martini with a mini chocolate bar stuck in it When I asked the bartender about this curious drink he replied he didn t have the chocolate liquor Why not just tell me and let me make another choice He did make me a different drink but made no apology nor did he comp my drink   Terrific location Enjoyed our stay in a very comfortable room Good lighting Lots of electrical outlets Loved the shower head Really nice breakfast

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Need instructions for phone buttons  Very cool boutique in an area that has a lot of ugly tourist hotels more for the traveler Stylish modern all you need to escape the chaotic streets and alleys of Amsterdam

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We stayed at double room the room would be a bit small to western guest but it was fine to Asians especially those who frequently visit Japan Breakfast costs EUR25 it is super expensive There are many restaurants near by offer hot breakfast from EUR4 a toast or pancake to EUR7 English breakfast   Located 6 mins walk from central station tram stations are nearby Clean with comfortable bed The provided toiletries Lavender and peppermint were great

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: When we checked in the room had some music noise from the bar below however the staff could not have been more helpful and friendly about moving us to a new quite room further away from the bar Hence we had a fantastic stay   The staff were fantastic the restaurant had lovely food and the rooms were great with a bit of character

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: bathroom and size of bedroom service at breakfast a little bit distracted   everything excellent breakfasts dinner in restaurant v good more variety would be nice hotel location walking distance to everywhere of interest

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Maybe the room could ve been a bit bigger  Absolutely fab The staff were friendly and attentive and the hotel really cool The design and attention to detail was amazing We are in the Resturant a couple of times and the food was outstanding

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Stuck above the restaurant very noisy Book 2 months a head a time Paid for a queen bed Got a small bed with small room Noisy Other then that great   Close to everything

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not worth the very high prices Certainly not a luxury hotel Staff friendly but not what you d expect at a hotel in this price range The room was very small   Convenient location Great restaurant Polite staff though not overly helpful Clean

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Even if we wrote our notes to hotel via booking com they said they didn t receive the note They reserved the smallest room for us even we informed them that this was our honeymoon They didn t change our room Expensive   Localn of the hotel is great Design and concept looks beautiful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Rooms are small too small that there was no space to place our luggages Given limited space hotel could throw away the sofa facing the bed not the TV and rearrange the room layout to provide space for suitcases   Good location close to central train station and royal palace

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing had a great stay  Clean and modern hotel well appointed and trendy atmosphere Very good restaurant also Location was excellent easy walk from the train station and in the middle of the live part of the city

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Found constant music intrusive and especially at breakfast too loud To communicate with my older friend I would have needed to speak so loudly that everyone else in the dining room would have heard   Breakfast was superb Helpful staff All clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bathroom did not have a proper door on so no privacy also there were no mirrors in the room only in the bathroom   All good Had a lovely stay at this hotel Good location walking distance from most of the main attractions and staff were lovely

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The windows are thin so soundproofing is not as good as I would have expected in a relatively new hotel And even when the air conditioning was turned off there was still air blowing into the room which is not a good thing if you are nearing a cold   The hotel is in a great location a 5 10 minute walk from the train station and near several tourist attractions I loved the design of my room very inspiring The bed was good as well

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing major to recall rooms were a bit tight but we got upgraded to a junior suite which is perfect in terms of size and confortability  The theme was nothing less of extraordinary location was superb

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We stayed for a few days and than left to Germany and came back we payed the same price but didn t get the same room   The staff was customer oriented and gave us answer to all our need s The Location was great The food was fantastic

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We had to go elsewhere for breakfast due to a 30 minute wait for breakfast They are a obviously connected to a cruise company so very busy changeover period Guests should have preference over non guests   Location was great Love the revamp Bar area good Staff wonderful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The staff are quite lovely and the service was exceptional I couldn t say I ve had a better experience elsewhere Thank you for a great stay

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It is expensive and it seems ridiculous the breakfast isn t included in the price If it had been we would have been more likely to have tried dinner there too Also you only receive complementary water the first night It is probably not that suitable for new couples as there is minimal privacy between the bedroom and bathroom   This is a very stylish hotel and the rooms are very comfortable The beds are excellent and the black out curtains work very well I slept really well here

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The hotel was recently renovated and is lovely and comfortable Marcel at the front desk is an absolute gem Be sure to ask him for advice he s happy to help and so enthusiastic The rooms are really quiet despite being on a busy street We never heard street noise or other rooms The location is great too There s a tram stop right out front so in addition to being walking distance from Centraal Station and a lot of sights it s an easy tram ride to even more

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The hotel was in a great location close to the central station and with the main sights easily accessible The hotel was fantastic unique and stylish interior comfortable clean rooms the restaurant served amazing food and the bar was great Staff were brilliant from the moment we arrived to when we left particularly Marcelle on reception who couldn t have been more helpful and was a real ambassador for the hotel The staff in the restaurant were also professional and friendly We would definitely recommend and return again as it was a great experience

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The only negative I have would be to have more movie channels even pay per view movies or some more English channels We went out all day until late evening but would of been nice to chill out with a movie  Really good location breakfeast lovely range of cooked breakfast soft boiled and scrambled eggs bacon mushrooms and sausages ect and cold hams cheese fuirt yogurt friendly helpful staff also was given a map when I checked in which I used for the whole of my trip There is a tram stop outside but I only used it once as we walked everywhere Needed to walk of all that lovely food ha With the map everything was really easy to find and fun too seeing bits along the way Really is a beautiful city Also I nice bar to catch a late night drink in Room was big enough for us very comfortable we had a king Really enjoyed my stay would come back

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Location is close to Dam Square but also near a few seedy streets Otherwise great   Great new hotel in Amsterdam Great value for price Simple but rooms more than sufficient Offered welcome drink Breakfast in the morning was nice

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No bad points   The hotel was in an excellent position to go sightseeing The rooms and facilities were all wonderfully maintained The staff were well informed snd helpfull but never intrusive

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Was given a table at breakfast away from other tables and alsmost felt we were forgotten and had to ask a number of times to get tea and coffee etc Very small closet and draw space in the rooms ok for a couple of nights but any longer would be an issued  Staff were very friendly and accommodating

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Maids came quite early we wanted a bit of a lay in and were woken by the maids knocking at 9 45   Room was lovely beds very comfy staff very helpful

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Stylish modern and very comfortable hotel within walking distance of all major sights Friendly staff and excellent facilities Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: no late room service thats the only thing   Location was optimal Design of the room was absolutely a creative feat that will inform amaze and make you laugh

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The staff were extremely lovely and helpful The blonde waiter in particular was extremely friendly and made some great suggestions on places to visit which we went to and loved

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room is small and there is no facility in the hotel ie GIM or spa or swimming pool   The reception check in and out was smooth the breakfast and the coffee in the room

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing to claim   Very nice and modern Hotel in the heart of Amsterdam easy to reach in a few minutes from the Central station Very friendly and helpful staff room chic and clean and quiet we would come back anytime Thanks

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Everything was great Excellent staff Close to attractions etc breakfast a little expensive but very good quality Quite room The concierge Josien was very attentive outstanding Highly recommend

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We arrived there at 11am knowing that our check in was at 2pm We had been offered to upgrade to another empty room for 35 as our wasn t ready yet but preferred to have our first walk around Went back at the Hotel at 1 30pm and the room wasn t ready yet so we decided to stay in their waiting room which was amazing We kept asking 3 more times until 2 50pm and the room was not ready yet so started complaining but the receptionist couldn t provide any time regarding when our room would be ready After few minutes complaining they offered up a free upgrade to premium room which was really appreciated   Basically everything staff very kind rooms very large and bright abundant breakfast very nice spaces and everything kept organized

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I felt the breakfast buffet was a little pricy at 25 euro but there are other options available for breakfast   The staff were great friendly and helpful When we arrived we were given a map of Amsterdam and a member of staff pointed out a few places of interest to get us started The hotel is classy quirky and spotlessly clean Bed is comfortable and large and the wifi is good

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 1 For a superior room it was tiny We have stayed in many hotels in Amsterdam which were much more spacious for the price 2 The lack of privacy with the bathroom There was no lock on the toilet door and no separation between the bedroom and bathroom 3 The walls were like paper I heard someone sneeze in the next room when I was in our bathroom Also when people bang their front doors it feels like the whole building shakes 4 The air con was temperamental and there was no guide to help us understand it With no opening windows in the room the air con was essential   1 The staff were outstanding Extremely helpful friendly and kind No queues for check in check out 2 The location was perfect right in the hub of everything 3 The facilities were great molton brown goodies We felt that the overall rating of the hotel was between 6 and 7 out of 10 and couldn t understand how the majority of reviews were up in the 9 10 mark but now I realise it s because of booking com calculating your overall review score so I had to mark a couple of things down to get an average score of 7 10

Hotel_Name: INK Hotel Amsterdam MGallery by Sofitel
